package shop.templates

import "shared/types" as Shared

type User {
  name: string
  active: bool
  tags: string[]
  nickname: string?
}

enum Tone { Primary, Secondary }

external FormatName(value: string): string

export component Greeting(user: User, count: int): html {
<p data-active={not user.active or user.nickname != null}>
  Hello, {FormatName(user.name)}! {count + 1 * 2}
</p>
}
